subject: [PATCH v2 075/110] cachefiles: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is addressing a concern about the use of %llu/%llx format strings in the cachefiles code, specifically that they are not used consistently throughout the code. The author has reviewed the changes and confirmed that the correct format strings are being used.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the cachefiles module to use the correct format strings for printing inode numbers, which are now u64 values. The PRIino macro has been removed and replaced with %llu/%llx format strings in various places throughout the code. This change ensures that inode numbers are printed correctly, even when they exceed 32-bit limits.
